params.name: Nethrone's Head
params.description: This skull, adorned with the pharaoh's crown, comes from Nethrone, one of the eight Great Demon Gods. With the power of death, he ruled the Kemetic Domain. But in a duel with a snail, he brought death upon himself, and his head was taken off as a souvenir.
params.ss1:

Per Demon God slain, Snail HP +100
Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
